title: Harris Essentials All-Purpose Large Flat Block Paint Brush All-Round, Multi-Purpose Brush for Brick, Decking, Fence, Applying PVA, Cleaning and Treating 4"
features: Essentials large flat 4 inch rectangular brush for use with all paints
The ideal brush for cleaning or painting large rough surfaces applying watered down PVA to repair wall damage or for single use with harsher wall treatments
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Essentials 4in Block Brush What's Included Contents 1 x 4in Block Brush All Purpose Block Brush Why this brush? This wide rectangular brush from Harris is ideal for painting large areas of masonry and exterior woodwork such as sheds, fences and decking. The brush gives a good finish when used with all exterior paints. Durable brush for all surfaces The Harris Essentials Block Brush's durable general purpose filaments, large block head and stainless steel ferrule make it a useful hard wearing addition to any project. Harris Painting & Decorating Tools Ranges Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range.
